findings.justification: Cited thread brasidas-synthesis resolves to brasidas_synthesis.2/ (latest version), but §3.1 anchor is not present in brasidas_synthesis.2/memo.md. The data-center disagreement framing this cite attributes to §3.1 now lives at §5.2 (the brasidas-synthesis memo.1 → memo.2 revision reorganized the substrate-divergence argument and moved the disagreement framing from §5.4 to §5.2). -1 dim 3 deduction; reviser should re-cite to §5.2.
Second occurrence of the same stale cite in the risks section. Same resolution as the §2 occurrence: cite should be re-pointed to §5.2 on the next revision pass. -1 dim 3 deduction (per-instance).
